name: Golf Oasis LV
address: 9175 S Las Vegas Blvd #160, Las Vegas, NV 89123
about: Golf Oasis LV is an indoor golf simulator venue offering 24/7 access and state-of-the-art simulation technology. The venue combines comfort and convenience with TruGolf and Golf VX simulators, providing an accessible and modern golf experience with access to world-famous courses at affordable prices. PGA-certified lessons are available, and the facility also offers club rental partnerships and corporate event packages to accommodate various player needs.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with digital key entry for flexible gameplay
Advanced TruGolf and Golf VX simulators with 4K course visuals
PGA-certified instruction for all skill levels
Club rental partnerships with free delivery service

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB not specified
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator with proprietary ball flight model
Features moving swing plate and multiple lie mats

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can rent clubs through Vegas Golf Co. with free delivery. Mention Golf Oasis LV for 10% off club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned, and BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulators feature auto-tee and ball retrieval to maintain pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly features are mentioned, though the venue does offer beginner-friendly options and lessons.
